data.content:
For a loan of ₹600,000 over 5 years at an interest rate of 10%, the monthly EMI would be approximately ₹12,748.23. 

If you intend to pay ₹10,000 per month, it would not be sufficient to cover this loan. 

_Disclaimer: Educational purposes only._
What are the ATM usage charges in metro cities?

In metro cities, you can use your own bank's ATMs an unlimited number of times for free. For other bank ATMs, the first 3 transactions per month are free; thereafter, there's a charge of ₹21 per transaction.

_Disclaimer: Educational purposes only._
can I visit the bank on a 4th Saturday at 2:00 PM?

No, the bank will be closed on the 4th Saturday. Branch operational hours are from 9:30 AM to 1:00 PM on Saturdays, and the bank is closed on the 2nd and 4th Saturdays of the month.

_Disclaimer: Educational purposes only._
